programme.title: Practice 1 - F1 Australia Grand Prix - 2026
programme.desc: Albert Park (Melbourne), 6–8 March 2026: the season-opener. Practice gives the first real read on long-run pace and tyre wear, qualifying is a flat-out one-lap fight where track evolution matters, and the Grand Prix is 58 laps (306.124km) shaped by strategy, safety cars and pit windows.

programme.title: Wolverhampton Wanderers vs Liverpool - English Premier League
programme.desc: All 380 matches from the English Premier league are live and exclusive only on beIN. All matches are available live with a choice of Arabic or English commentary. programme.title: Race- F1 Australia Grand Prix - 2026
programme.desc: Albert Park (Melbourne), 6–8 March 2026: the season-opener. Practice gives the first real read on long-run pace and tyre wear, qualifying is a flat-out one-lap fight where track evolution matters, and the Grand Prix is 58 laps (306.124km) shaped by strategy, safety cars and pit windows.

programme.desc: The 2025–26 UEFA Europa League is the secondary club football tournament organised by UEFA. This is the second season played under a new format, which replaced the 32-team group stage with a 36-team league phase. Tottenham Hotspur are the reigning champions. The final will be played on 20 May 2026 at Beşiktaş Stadium in Istanbul, Turkey.

Nuno Borges (POR) vs Emilio Nava (USA) - ATP 1000 BNP Paribas Open
programme.desc: Played at Indian Wells Tennis Garden, this ATP Masters 1000 features one of the slowest hard courts on tour, with a high bounce that neutralizes power and rewards heavy topspin and patience. Desert wind conditions and a 96-player draw make it a true endurance test over two weeks, often favoring strong returners and baseline grinders.

programme.title: Terence Atmane (FRA) vs Grigor Dimitrov (BUL) - ATP 1000 BNP Paribas Open
programme.desc: Played at Indian Wells Tennis Garden, this ATP Masters 1000 features one of the slowest hard courts on tour, with a high bounce that neutralizes power and rewards heavy topspin and patience. Desert wind conditions and a 96-player draw make it a true endurance test over two weeks, often favoring strong returners and baseline grinders.

programme.title: EPL The Big Interview 2025/2026

programme.title: Ligue 1 Weekly Review - 2025/2026
programme.desc: Each Ligue 1 Match week is condensed into a 52-minute highlights show. Every game, goal, penalty, red card and everything in between is squeezed into an action-packed hour to ensure no football fan misses a kick across the game season.

programme.title: Le Havre vs Paris Saint-Germain - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 24
programme.desc: Le Havre have lost nine of their last 10 Ligue 1 matches against Paris SG, which is only one fewer than in their first 23 encounters. Paris SG are the team Le Havre have hosted most often in the 21st century in all competitions while losing 100% of these matches.

programme.title: La Liga Highlights 2025/2026
programme.desc: "This 55-minute program offers full 5-minute highlights of each of the games played on Friday, Saturday and Sunday.LALIGA includes special video presentations of the best goal, the best save and the best player of the day."

programme.title: Barcelona vs Villarreal - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 26
programme.desc: FC Barcelona have lost two of their last four LaLiga matches against Villarreal CF, twice as many defeats as they suffered in their previous 29 encounters against them in the competition. At home, Barcelona have lost three of their last four matches against Villarreal in LaLiga, including the last two, making them the opponent against whom they have suffered the most home defeats in the competition since 2021/22.

programme.title: Real Madrid vs Getafe - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 26
programme.desc: Real Madrid have won 21 of their last 24 matches against Getafe in LaLiga, scoring a total of 55 goals and conceding just 10 during this period. Getafe have only picked up points in two of their 20 away matches against Real Madrid in LaLiga. Bernd Schuster was in the dugout for both of these games, a 1-1 draw in March 2007 as Getafe coach and a 0-1 win in February 2008 as Real Madrid coach.

programme.title: Hail Baja - Rally Highlights 2026
programme.desc: A review show of the 2026 Hail Toyota International Baja, this multi-day cross-country rally raid event is held in Saudi Arabia and taking place in the challenging terrain of the Great Nafud Desert

programme.title: Australian Open Official Film "The Score" 2026
programme.desc: The Score, the official 2026 Australian Open tournament film (AO26), highlights the tournament's, key moments, players, and, drama, featuring, behind-the-scenes, action. It also showcases, the, ",symphony, of the Australian Open".

programme.title: UEFA UCL Magazine 2025/2026 - MD10 Review
programme.desc: A recap of the best of the action, plus a look forward to the next Match Day in Europe’s premium football competition, the UEFA Champions League. The 2025/26 UEFA Champions League will be the second to be played under the new 36-team league phase. programme.title: Newcastle United vs. Manchester United - English Premier League 2026/2027
programme.desc: Newcastle United have won their last three home Premier League matches against Manchester United, as many as in their previous 18 combined. The Magpies last had a longer home league winning run against the Red Devils between 1915 and 1931. Man Utd are looking to record a Premier League double over Newcastle for the first time since the 2020-21 campaign; they won 1-0 on Boxing Day thanks to a goal from Patrick Dorgu.

programme.title: Arsenal vs. Chelsea - English Premier League 2026/2027
programme.desc: Arsenal have won their last three home league games against Chelsea, last winning more consecutively between 1990 and 1994. Chelsea are winless in their last eight Premier League games against Arsenal, their longest since a run of 19 between 1995 and 2005.

programme.title: Wolverhampton Wanderers vs. Liverpool - English Premier League 2026/2027
programme.desc: Wolves have lost 17 of their last 18 Premier League matches against Liverpool, winning the other 3-0 in February 2023 at Molineux under Julen Lopetegui. Liverpool have won 83% of their Premier League games against Wolves, winning 19 of 23 games – that is the best win ratio of any side to face another 20+ times in the competition’s history.

programme.title: Tottenham Hotspur vs. Crystal Palace - English Premier League 2026/2027
programme.desc: Tottenham Hotspur have won 16 of their last 21 Premier League matches against Crystal Palace, although they have lost two of their last three against the Eagles. After nine consecutive away league defeats at Tottenham Hotspur between 2015-16 and 2023-24, Crystal Palace won this exact fixture 2-0 last season. They have never won consecutive away league games against Spurs.

programme.title: Newcastle United vs. Manchester United - English Premier League 2026/2027
programme.desc: Newcastle United have won their last three home Premier League matches against Manchester United, as many as in their previous 18 combined. programme.title: Tottenham Hotspur vs. Crystal Palace - English Premier League 2026/2027
programme.desc: Tottenham Hotspur have won 16 of their last 21 Premier League matches against Crystal Palace, although they have lost two of their last three against the Eagles. After nine consecutive away league defeats at Tottenham Hotspur between 2015-16 and 2023-24, Crystal Palace won this exact fixture 2-0 last season. They have never won consecutive away league games against Spurs.

programme.title: Wolverhampton Wanderers vs. Liverpool - English Premier League 2026/2027
programme.desc: Wolves have lost 17 of their last 18 Premier League matches against Liverpool, winning the other 3-0 in February 2023 at Molineux under Julen Lopetegui. programme.title: Le Havre vs Paris Saint-Germain - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 24
programme.desc: Le Havre have lost nine of their last 10 Ligue 1 matches against Paris SG, which is only one fewer than in their first 23 encounters. Paris SG are the team Le Havre have hosted most often in the 21st century in all competitions while losing 100% of these matches.

programme.title: La Liga Highlights 2025/2026
programme.desc: "This 55-minute program offers full 5-minute highlights of each of the games played on Friday, Saturday and Sunday.LALIGA includes special video presentations of the best goal, the best save and the best player of the day."

programme.title: Barcelona vs Villarreal - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 26
programme.desc: FC Barcelona have lost two of their last four LaLiga matches against Villarreal CF, twice as many defeats as they suffered in their previous 29 encounters against them in the competition. At home, Barcelona have lost three of their last four matches against Villarreal in LaLiga, including the last two, making them the opponent against whom they have suffered the most home defeats in the competition since 2021/22.

programme.title: Real Madrid vs Getafe - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 26
programme.desc: Real Madrid have won 21 of their last 24 matches against Getafe in LaLiga, scoring a total of 55 goals and conceding just 10 during this period. Getafe have only picked up points in two of their 20 away matches against Real Madrid in LaLiga. Bernd Schuster was in the dugout for both of these games, a 1-1 draw in March 2007 as Getafe coach and a 0-1 win in February 2008 as Real Madrid coach.

programme.title: Hail Baja - Rally Highlights 2026
programme.desc: A review show of the 2026 Hail Toyota International Baja, this multi-day cross-country rally raid event is held in Saudi Arabia and taking place in the challenging terrain of the Great Nafud Desert

Elche vs Espanyol - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 26
programme.desc: Elche have lost their last two LaLiga meetings against Espanyol, failing to score in both. The Franjiverdes have not lost three consecutive matches against the Pericos in the competition since March 1985 and have never gone three successive games without scoring in this fixture. Espanyol have picked up points in four of their last six away games against Elche in LaLiga and have achieved more victories in these last six visits than in the rest of their away meetings against the Valencian side in the top-flight.

programme.title: Real Madrid vs Getafe - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 26
programme.desc: Real Madrid have won 21 of their last 24 matches against Getafe in LaLiga, scoring a total of 55 goals and conceding just 10 during this period. Getafe have only picked up points in two of their 20 away matches against Real Madrid in LaLiga. Bernd Schuster was in the dugout for both of these games, a 1-1 draw in March 2007 as Getafe coach and a 0-1 win in February 2008 as Real Madrid coach.

programme.title: Olympique Marseille vs Olympique Lyonnais - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 24
programme.desc: There have been 40 draws between Marseille and Lyon in Ligue 1, with only Marseille-Bordeaux seeing a greater number of draws in the history of the league. However, the last draw between these two teams in the competition was in the 2020-21 season. Marseille have won each of their last three home games against Lyon in Ligue 1, as many as in their previous 14. OM could record four consecutive home wins against Les Gones for the third time, after 1952-1956 and 1993-1997.

programme.title: Lamine Yamal - The Future Of Football
programme.desc: Lamine Yamal, a prodigy developed at La Masia, has risen at a remarkably young age to the world stage of football thanks to his talent, maturity and creativity. Through his rapid ascent, this documentary asks a key question : is he just an early phenomenon, or true embodiment of the future of modern football ?

programme.title: Cesson-Rennes vs Chambery - LNH Division 1 - French Handball Starligue
programme.desc: Dive into the excitement of French handball with Liqui Moly Starligue, formerly LNH Division 1. Established in 1952, this premier league event features 16 top teams battling for glory. With Montpellier’s 14 Handball titles and Paris Saint-Germain's 11 wins, the competition is fierce. Champions earn spots in the EHF Champions League, while cup winners qualify for the European League.

programme.title: Cesson-Rennes vs Chambery - LNH Division 1 - French Handball Starligue
programme.desc: Dive into the excitement of French handball with Liqui Moly Starligue, formerly LNH Division 1. Established in 1952, this premier league event features 16 top teams battling for glory. With Montpellier’s 14 Handball titles and Paris Saint-Germain's 11 wins, the competition is fierce. Champions earn spots in the EHF Champions League, while cup winners qualify for the European League.

programme.desc: France’s top men’s volleyball competition, the LNV Ligue A Masculine (Marmara SpikeLigue), delivers a season of elite clubs battling through a home-and-away league before the playoffs. programme.title: Ferencváros vs Sporting Braga - UEFA Europa League 2025/2026 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
programme.desc: The 2025–26 UEFA Europa League is the secondary club football tournament organised by UEFA. This is the second season played under a new format, which replaced the 32-team group stage with a 36-team league phase. Tottenham Hotspur are the reigning champions. The final will be played on 20 May 2026 at Beşiktaş Stadium in Istanbul, Turkey.

Nuno Borges (POR) vs Emilio Nava (USA) - ATP 1000 BNP Paribas Open
programme.desc: Played at Indian Wells Tennis Garden, this ATP Masters 1000 features one of the slowest hard courts on tour, with a high bounce that neutralizes power and rewards heavy topspin and patience. Desert wind conditions and a 96-player draw make it a true endurance test over two weeks, often favoring strong returners and baseline grinders.

programme.title: M4 - Day 4 - ATP 1000 BNP Paribas Open
programme.desc: Played at Indian Wells Tennis Garden, this ATP Masters 1000 features one of the slowest hard courts on tour, with a high bounce that neutralizes power and rewards heavy topspin and patience. Desert wind conditions and a 96-player draw make it a true endurance test over two weeks, often favoring strong returners and baseline grinders.

Practice 1 - F1 Australia Grand Prix - 2026
programme.desc: Albert Park (Melbourne), 6–8 March 2026: the season-opener. Practice gives the first real read on long-run pace and tyre wear, qualifying is a flat-out one-lap fight where track evolution matters, and the Grand Prix is 58 laps (306.124km) shaped by strategy, safety cars and pit windows.

Local support and Honda’s home presence add extra intensity to this demanding round.

programme.desc: Albert Park (Melbourne), 6–8 March 2026: the season-opener. Nantes vs Nimes - LNH Division 1 - French Handball Starligue
programme.desc: Dive into the excitement of French handball with Liqui Moly Starligue, formerly LNH Division 1. Established in 1952, this premier league event features 16 top teams battling for glory. With Montpellier’s 14 Handball titles and Paris Saint-Germain's 11 wins, the competition is fierce. Champions earn spots in the EHF Champions League, while cup winners qualify for the European League.

Established in 1952, this premier league event features 16 top teams battling for glory. With Montpellier’s 14 Handball titles and Paris Saint-Germain's 11 wins, the competition is fierce. Champions earn spots in the EHF Champions League, while cup winners qualify for the European League.

programme.title: Al Sadd vs Umm Salal - Qatar Stars League 2025/26 - W18
programme.desc: The Qatari League is the official football league in Qatar. The league includes 12 teams. The most famous participating clubs are Al-Sadd, the champions of the last season; Al-Rayyan and Al-Arabi, the popular teams, Al-Duhail and Al-Gharafa, serious contenders for the title every season. The Qatari league includes star names such as Firmino, Verratti, and Qatari Akram Afif, the best player in Asia.

programme.title: Montpellier vs Paris - LNH Division 1 - French Handball Starligue
programme.desc: Dive into the excitement of French handball with Liqui Moly Starligue, formerly LNH Division 1. Established in 1952, this premier league event features 16 top teams battling for glory. With Montpellier’s 14 Handball titles and Paris Saint-Germain's 11 wins, the competition is fierce. Champions earn spots in the EHF Champions League, while cup winners qualify for the European League.

programme.title: Football Legends - News
programme.desc: In the world of sports, few debates ignite passion and enthusiasm quite like the discussion surrounding the greatest football players of all time. This topic transcends generations, cultures, and nationalities, as fans passionately defend their favorites and recount unforgettable moments on the pitch. From legendary goal scorers to masterful playmakers, the players who have left an indelible mark on the game deserve recognition and celebration. " Football Legends" explore the remarkable careers and contributions of these iconic players who have shaped the beautiful game.

programme.title: Malaga vs Valladolid - LaLiga Hypermotion 2025-2026 - Spanish La liga 2
programme.desc: La Liga 2 is the men's second professional association football division of the Spanish football league system. It is contested by 22 teams, with the top two teams plus the winner of a play-off promoted to La Liga and replaced by the three lowest-placed teams in that division.

programme.title: Racing vs Cordoba - LaLiga Hypermotion 2025-2026 - Spanish La liga 2
programme.desc: La Liga 2 is the men's second professional association football division of the Spanish football league system. It is contested by 22 teams, with the top two teams plus the winner of a play-off promoted to La Liga and replaced by the three lowest-placed teams in that division.

programme.desc: The UEFA Conference League is the third-tier club football tournament organised by UEFA. The new format competition runs for its second season live and exclusive only on beIN. The RB Arena in Leipzig, Germany, is the venue for the Conference League final on 27 May 2026.
